# Copilot Instructions

## Project Overview

SphericalStreamerCow is a toy model to simulate the C/O ratio evolution in protoplanetary disks, including the possible impact of streamers (infalling gas/dust flows from the surrounding envelope onto the disk).

The project is released into the public domain under the [Unlicense](../LICENSE).

## Domain Context

- **C/O ratio**: The carbon-to-oxygen abundance ratio in a disk, a key observable in planet formation and exoplanet atmospheric chemistry.
- **Streamers**: Late-stage infall features that can deliver chemically distinct material to specific disk radii, potentially altering the local C/O ratio.
- The model is intentionally simple ("toy model") — favor clarity and reproducibility over complexity.
